Running queries.
A fatal error occurred: Error initializing the IMB disk cache: the cache directory is already locked by another running process. Only one instance of the IMB can access a cache directory at a time. The lock file is located at <REPO_ROOT>/codeql-dbs/linux-v5.15-arm-am/db-cpp/default/cache/.lock
(eventual cause: OverlappingFileLockException)
